name: peep-skills
description: Production-grade Claude Code skills for frontend craft, productivity, skill creation, skill discovery, image generation, and compact communication.

plugins.name: frontend-craft
plugins.description: Build memorable, production-grade frontend interfaces. Anti-AI-slop. Bold aesthetics + rigorous craft systems.

plugins.name: caveman
plugins.description: Ultra-compressed communication mode. Cuts ~75% of tokens while keeping full technical accuracy by speaking like a caveman.

plugins.name: find-skills
plugins.description: Discover and install agent skills from the open skills ecosystem.

plugins.name: skill-creator
plugins.description: Create, modify, evaluate, benchmark, and improve agent skills.

plugins.name: using-superpowers
plugins.description: Require skill discovery and invocation before agent responses and actions.

plugins.name: ai-image-generation
plugins.description: Generate and edit AI images with inference.sh models through the belt CLI.

plugins.name: vercel-react-best-practices
plugins.description: React and Next.js performance optimization guidelines from Vercel Engineering.

plugins.name: shadcn
plugins.description: Manage shadcn/ui components and projects: adding, searching, debugging, styling, and composing UI.

plugins.name: forge-agent-loop
plugins.description: Projeta loops de agentes verificáveis, retomáveis e portáteis entre Codex, Claude Code e OpenCode.

plugins.name: sandeco-loop
plugins.description: Forja loops de agente com check externo, estado retomável, guardrails reais, auto-sugestão e adaptadores para Codex, Claude Code e OpenCode.

plugins.name: analytics-craft
plugins.description: Design and implement gerencial analytics panels — retention, cohort heatmap, health banners, WoW metrics. Turns raw data into executive insight. Anti-chart-soup.

plugins.name: fastapi-auth
plugins.description: Complete auth system for FastAPI with JWT, bcrypt, password reset, rate limiting and migrations.

plugins.name: multi-provider-ai
plugins.description: Route AI requests across OpenRouter and Google Gemini with automatic fallback and structured output repair.

plugins.name: pwa-craft
plugins.description: Ship production PWAs with cache versioning, offline fallback, iOS support and install prompts.

plugins.name: telegram-admin-bot
plugins.description: Wire up a secure Telegram bot for SaaS administration, reports, menus, notifications and broadcasts.

plugins.name: security-hardening-loop
plugins.description: Loop autônomo de hardening: escaneia e corrige vulnerabilidades uma a uma, com baseline operacional, check pós-fix, rollback automático via git e estado retomável. Complemento do security-review.

plugins.name: security-review
plugins.description: AI-powered security scanner that reasons like a researcher: data flow tracing, dependency CVEs, secrets, crypto and access control, with severity-rated findings and proposed patches.

plugins.name: web-push
plugins.description: Implement Web Push notifications with VAPID, subscription management, routing and service worker integration.

plugins.name: mjolnir
plugins.description: Context Operating System for coding agents: loads the right context, not the maximum. Progressive expansion, investigate-don't-search, output compression and secret guard. Zero-dependency Python toolkit; ~68% fewer tokens on broad comprehension tasks.

plugins.name: seo-mestre
plugins.description: SEO audit and site architecture multi-agent framework: technical SEO, PageSpeed/Core Web Vitals, accessibility, AEO, GEO/AIO (AI citability), LLM crawlers, structured data, local SEO, WordPress and conversion. Scores 0-100 with a 24h/7d/30d/90d action plan.

plugins.name: archify
plugins.description: Architecture, workflow, sequence, data-flow and lifecycle diagrams as self-contained HTML with SVG, theme toggle and PNG/JPEG/WebP/SVG export. Plain language or Mermaid in, validated JSON IR + zero-dep Node renderers.

plugins.name: scroll-world
plugins.description: Build an immersive scroll-scrubbed 'fly through the world' landing page for any industry or brand using Higgsfield. Camera flies from outside each scene into its interior, then to the next, with no cuts — one continuous flight. Requires Higgsfield CLI (paid credits), ffmpeg/ffprobe and Python+Pillow.

plugins.name: watch
plugins.description: Watch video URLs or local files using captions, scene-aware frames and optional Whisper transcription.

plugins.name: notebooklm
plugins.description: Automate Google NotebookLM research, grounded chat, source management and artifact generation through its CLI.

plugins.name: graphify
plugins.description: Turn code, schemas, infrastructure and documents into a persistent, queryable knowledge graph.

plugins.name: obsidian
plugins.description: Create and edit Obsidian Markdown, Bases, JSON Canvas files and clean web content for vaults.

plugins.name: impeccable
plugins.description: Design fluency for frontend implementation, critique, polish, accessibility and anti-pattern detection.

plugins.name: ponytail
plugins.description: Lazy senior developer mode: YAGNI, standard library first, minimal correct code and over-engineering reviews.
